summary: ANDROID 🟥 Incorrect device state displayed after prolonged app idle; wrong headset shown as connected and settings accessible
scenario: App displays stale earbud connection state (left connected, right disconnected) and fails to show actually connected Voyager Surround 80 UC after extended idle period, requiring app restart to refresh device list
description_clean: After the app is idle for several hours (e.g., overnight), the device state is not refreshed correctly upon launch. The app displays earbuds as partially connected (left connected, right disconnected) even though both earbuds are in the charging case and fully disconnected in the system Bluetooth menu. Meanwhile, the actually connected device (Voyager Surround 80 UC) is not shown in the app. The app also incorrectly allows access to earbuds settings when the earbuds are disconnected; toggling settings produces no response. The device list and connection states update correctly only after restarting the app.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and pair both Poly earbuds and a Voyager Surround 80 UC headset with the phone via system Bluetooth.
2. Place both earbuds in the charging case and ensure they are fully disconnected (verify in system Bluetooth menu that they are not listed as connected).
3. Leave the app idle for several hours (e.g., overnight) without closing it.
4. After the idle period, bring the app to the foreground and observe the Home screen device list.
5. Tap on the earbuds entry in the device list and attempt to access Device Settings → Audio Settings → any feature (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
6. Toggle any setting (e.g., ANC on/off) and observe the response.
7. Check the system Bluetooth menu to confirm which devices are actually connected.
8. Force close the app and relaunch it, then observe the device list and connection states again.
expected: Upon app launch after idle period, the Home screen should show the Voyager Surround 80 UC as the connected device (since it is actually connected via system Bluetooth). The earbuds should not appear as connected or partially connected (left/right) since both are in the charging case and disconnected. Tapping on a disconnected device should not allow access to its settings, or settings toggles should have no effect.
actual: After idle period, the app displays earbuds as partially connected (left connected, right disconnected) even though both earbuds are in the charging case and fully disconnected in the system Bluetooth menu. The actually connected Voyager Surround 80 UC is not shown in the app. The app incorrectly allows access to earbuds settings when the earbuds are disconnected; toggling settings produces no response. Device list and connection states update correctly only after restarting the app.
